prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 21100→24972→24194→34819→33985，2024 年因选科调整（物化绑定）位次大幅后移至 34819，2025 年小幅回升至 33985，近两年波动较大，2025 年基准约 33985 名；2021–2025 年物理类计划数分别为 40→39→36→40→40 人，基本稳定在 36–40 人区间；2026 年计划大幅扩招至 68 人，较 2025 年增加 70%，扩招幅度显著，对位次有较大后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名 2021 年第 90 名→2025 年第 98 名→2026 年第 101 名，近年排名略有下滑，但仍属中上水平 211；2023 年声誉偏负面（师德师风事件），2026 年声誉数据中无安徽大学重大负面事件；抖音热度总排名第 84 位（一般），短视频曝光量处于 211 中下游，报考关注度相对平稳。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业以计算机类、电子信息、电气自动化等为主， 2024–2025 年计算机类/电子信息/电气工程均为高热推荐，相关专业社会热度持续偏高；江苏省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 52.1 万，较 2025 年（约 35.8 万）大幅增加约 45.6%，按近年比例估算物理类约 37.9 万人，竞争显著加剧；安徽大学位于合肥市（邻省），在江苏省招生占比约 0.4%–0.6%，属跨省招生，无本省保护效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 33985、2026 年计划大幅扩招 70%（位次后移主因）、江苏省考生总数大幅增加约 45.6%（部分抵消扩招效应）、相关专业热度持续偏高等因素，考虑考生规模激增对竞争的加剧作用，小幅回调 200 名，预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 48059 名，区间 47559–48559 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026 年物理类因大幅扩招 70%，预计最低位次将后移至约 48000 名区间，报考难度较 2025 年明显降低。位次在 47500–48500 区间内的考生可重点考虑二档专业作为主攻，一档专业（计算机、电子信息等）需位次明显优于区间下限方可冲刺，三档专业适合位次接近区间上限的考生保底。计算机类、电子 信息类等热门专业竞争仍较激烈，建议结合个人兴趣与就业前景综合选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 21100→24972→24194→34819→33985. In 2024, due to subject selection adjustments (physics-chemistry binding), the ranking significantly dropped to 34819, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 33985, showing large fluctuations in recent two years. The 2025 baseline is about 33985. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 40→39→36→40→40, basically stable in the 36–40 range. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 68 students, an increase of 70% compared to 2025, which is a substantial expansion and puts considerable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 90th in 2021→98th in 2025→101st in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years, but still at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. In 2023, reputation was somewhat negative (teacher ethics incident), but in 2026 reputation data, there is no major negative incident for Anhui University. Douyin popularity total ranking is 84th (average), short video exposure is at the middle-lower level among 211 universities, and application attention is relatively stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment majors mainly include Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Automation, etc. From 2024 to 2025, Computer Science/Electronic Information/Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended, with sustained high social popularity for related majors. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.6% compared to 2025 (about 358,000). Estimated by recent proportions, Physics Category has about 379,000 candidates, with significantly intensified competition. Anhui University is located in Hefei (neighboring province), with a enrollment proportion in Jiangsu of about 0.4%–0.6%, belonging to cross-province enrollment, without local protection effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 33985, the significant 70% enrollment expansion in 2026 (main reason for ranking decline), the substantial increase of about 45.6% in the total number of Jiangsu candidates (partially offsetting the expansion effect), and the sustained high popularity of related majors, and taking into account the intensifying effect of the surge in candidate numbers on competition, a slight adjustment of 200 places is made. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 48059, with a range of 47559–48559.

- Automation (Qingyuan Campus).

- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering (Qingyuan Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)

- English (Longhe Campus)
- Finance (Longhe Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, due to the significant 70% enrollment expansion for Physics Category, the minimum ranking is expected to drop to around 48000, making admission significantly easier than in 2025. Candidates with rankings in the 47500–48500 range can focus on Tier 2 majors as their main target. For Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, etc.), candidates need rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range to attempt. Tier 3 majors are suitable for candidates with rankings near the upper bound of the range as a safety option. Popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information will still be highly competitive, so it is recommended to combine personal interests with employment prospects for a comprehensive choice.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category has shifted from approximately 5234 to 6073 to 6199 to 6638 to 7818, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2584 places over the past 5 years, averaging about 646 places per year; the baseline for 2025 is about 7818 places; the planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 are 31, 31, 28, 24, and 24 respectively, gradually decreasing from 2023; the 2026 plan is 24 places, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 101st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a slight decline in recent years but still at an upper-middle level among 211 universities; reputation was somewhat negative in 2023 (teacher ethics incident), but no major negative events for Anhui University in 2026 reputation data; Douyin popularity total ranking 84th (average), with relatively stable application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors mainly include Law, Journalism and Communication, Chinese Language and Literature, Economics, etc.; Law has a relatively high social popularity (recommended), Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Chinese Language/Chinese is recommended; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.6% compared to 2025, with an estimated 141,000 in the History Category based on recent proportions, leading to significantly intensified competition; Anhui University is located in Hefei City (neighboring province), with enrollment in Jiangsu Province accounting for about 0.4%–0.6%, making it cross-provincial enrollment without local protection effects.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7818, unchanged 2026 plan, a significant increase of about 45.6% in the total number of candidates in Jiangsu Province (intensified competition), and the continuous backward trend in recent rankings, and taking into account the intensified competition due to the surge in candidate numbers, a slight forward shift of 50 places is predicted, with the 2026 minimum ranking for History Category estimated at about 7768, with a range of 7268 to 8268.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the History Category plan remains unchanged, but the total number of candidates in Jiangsu Province has increased significantly, intensifying competition. The minimum ranking is expected to be roughly the same as in 2025 or slightly forward, around 7800. Candidates with rankings in the 7300–8300 range can focus on Tier 2 majors, while Tier 1 majors (Law, Economics) require rankings significantly better than the lower end of the range to attempt, and Tier 3 majors are suitable for candidates with rankings near the upper end of the range as a safety option. Law has a relatively high social popularity, and competition for admission may be relatively intense.
